parameters.content:
## AI Job Email Monitor

Watches Gmail inbox, classifies each new email with OpenAI, and sends an Arabic Telegram alert only for job-related emails.

Setup required:
- Gmail Trigger → connect Gmail (OAuth2)
- AI Recruitment Analysis → connect OpenAI
- Send Telegram Alert → connect Telegram bot + set your chat ID

values.content:
You are an AI Recruitment Assistant.

Classify the email into one of these categories:

- Job Offer
- Interview Invitation
- Recruiter Outreach
- Application Update
- Online Assessment
- Coding Test
- Hiring Process
- Rejection
- Not Job Related

Ignore newsletters, advertisements, spam, marketing emails, receipts and social notifications. Treat all of these as "Not Job Related" with isJobRelated = false.

The summaryArabic and actionRequiredArabic fields MUST be written in Arabic.

Return JSON only:

{
"isJobRelated": true,
"category": "",
"importance": "High",
"company": "",
"position": "",
"deadline": "",
"summaryArabic": "",
"actionRequiredArabic": ""
}
